name: 05-local-pull
title: Pull flow + bundle signatures (Slice 5)
description: Implement confighub init/pull/diff/apply --from for remote hub bundles. Add ed25519 bundle signatures (sign on serve, verify on pull/apply). Client-side bundle cache under state/pull/<profile>/. Reuse Slice 3 apply path. Verify end-to-end against the deployed hk-cn2 hub using profile 'air'.
creator: Ruichen Zhou
